% --- Page numbers: "1/2", "2/2" centered in the footer ---

\pagestyle{fancy}

\renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}

% --- Section headings: bold, with a rule underneath ---

\titlespacing{\section}{0pt}{1.1em}{0.6em}

\setlength{\parindent}{0pt}

% --- helper: a presentation year (year on the left, events on the right) ---
\newcommand{\yearblock}[2]{%
  \noindent\begin{minipage}[t]{0.07\textwidth}{#1.}\end{minipage}%
  \begin{minipage}[t]{0.90\textwidth}#2\end{minipage}\par\vspace{0.5em}}
